title: Daedalus plan-maturation chain — the authority-anchored lineage of Clotho Phase 1 plan versions
note: Each entry is a Daedalus product: a matured plan version, content-addressed with the SAME hashing rule the comprehension gate uses (sha256(canonicalize({kind:'candidate', plan:<bytes>}))). Only versions with hashes anchored in CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json appear here; earlier deltas (v1-v10) are indexed descriptively in ../EVIDENCE/delta-chain.json. Exactly one entry is active; every other entry must_not_govern_new_work.

chain.note: authz-007 correctly blocked v14: AM-41's blanket hashbang exclusion contradicted Task 5's weave.mjs shebang. The block is the system working — convergence is not authorization.

why: A future model must be able to walk the maturation lineage without inferring authority from filenames or dates. Every hop is (delta run -> plan version -> authorization outcome), and two hops are honest blocks (v11, v14) preserved so the chain shows Daedalus output being REFUSED authorization — the separation this layer exists to teach.
change_rule: A new plan version appends an entry (Daedalus delta -> TELOS authz -> update CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json + this contract in the same change). Entries are never rewritten; supersession is recorded, not erased.

oracle.contract_equals_code: docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs (re-hashes every chain entry from disk; requires the active entry to equal active_plan and the superseded entries to match CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json exactly)
